name: Credit Saint LLC
description_short: Credit Saint is a credit repair company founded in 2007 that disputes inaccurate or unfair negative items with creditors and all three credit bureaus on your behalf.
description_long:
Credit Saint LLC is a credit repair company that has operated since 2007, accumulating over 19 years of experience in the industry. The company reports having helped more than 250,000 Americans address credit problems, and holds a 4.8-star rating across more than 14,000 Google reviews, with 11,000+ five-star reviews cited across platforms including ConsumerAffairs and Money.com. It markets itself as the number-one ranked credit repair service by several financial review sites.

Credit Saint's core service is disputing inaccurate or unfair negative items on a client's credit report. The process begins with clients submitting their personal information through a secure online portal, after which Credit Saint pulls a free credit report without impacting the client's score. A credit specialist reviews the report, identifies problem items, and sends dispute letters to creditors and all three major credit bureaus. The company handles eight specific negative item types: collections, late payments, foreclosures, charge-offs, bankruptcies, judgments, repossessions, and liens. Alongside dispute work, they provide advice on leveraging existing positive credit history.

Credit Saint offers three tiered monthly plans — Credit Polish at $79.99/month, Credit Remodel at $109.99/month, and Clean Slate at $139.99/month — each with a one-time first work fee of $99 (or $195 for Clean Slate). All three plans include a 90-day money-back guarantee. The plan tier structure appears to differ in the scope or aggressiveness of disputes, though the website does not detail exactly which item types are covered at each level.

Credit Saint is a legitimate option for consumers dealing with multiple inaccurate negative items who prefer professional management over self-disputing. However, the monthly fees are among the higher end of the credit repair market, and like all credit repair companies, Credit Saint legally cannot guarantee a specific result or credit score increase. Consumers who only have one or two straightforward errors to dispute may find the cost-to-value ratio unfavorable compared to self-disputing directly with the bureaus for free.
address: 250 Pehle Ave Suite 200, Saddle Brook, NJ 07663

company_info.headquarters: 250 Pehle Ave Suite 200, Saddle Brook, NJ 07663

pros: 19 years in business since 2007 — one of the more established credit repair companies
4.8-star rating with 14,000+ Google reviews and 11,000+ five-star reviews across multiple platforms
90-day money-back guarantee included on all three plans
Disputes eight specific negative item types including foreclosure, bankruptcy, and liens
Free credit report pull through their portal with no score impact
Secure online portal for document submission and account management
Credit optimization advice provided alongside dispute work
cons: One-time first work fee of $99–$195 is charged before dispute work begins, in addition to the monthly fee
Monthly fees ($79.99–$139.99) are relatively high compared to self-disputing directly with bureaus at no cost
No guaranteed results — legally cannot promise credit score improvements or item removal
The website does not clearly differentiate what specific disputes each of the three plan tiers actually covers
Not available in all US states — credit repair company state restrictions apply but are not disclosed on the homepage
best_for: Consumers with multiple inaccurate or unverifiable negative items across all three credit bureaus
People who have gone through foreclosure, bankruptcy, or repossession and have lingering disputed items
Individuals who want a fully managed dispute process and are willing to pay a premium for it
Those who have already tried self-disputing without success and want professional follow-through
diagnosis: Credit Saint is best suited for consumers with several inaccurate or unverifiable negative items who want a hands-off, professionally managed dispute process backed by a well-reviewed company with nearly two decades of history. The main caveat is cost: monthly fees plus the upfront first work fee make this one of the pricier credit repair options, and no company — including Credit Saint — can legally guarantee score improvements or item removal.
services: Credit report dispute letters sent to all three major credit bureaus
Free credit report pull (no score impact)
Credit optimization advice and positive history coaching
